caption: In the video, a person is seen handling dental prosthetics and molds in what appears to be a dental laboratory or clinic setting. The individual is holding a set of dentures in one hand and a small dental mold in the other, examining them closely. In front of them, there is an orange basket filled with various dental molds and prosthetics, indicating a workspace dedicated to dental work. The background includes a computer monitor and a sink, suggesting that this area is used for both digital planning and hands-on crafting of dental appliances. The person seems focused on their task, possibly comparing the mold to the dentures to ensure proper fit and alignment. The environment is clean and organized, emphasizing precision and care in the dental work being performed.
